name: betabots
description: Synthetic human beta cohorts for product discovery, multi-session usability, and live social-graph simulation.

interface.shortDescription: Run human-like synthetic beta cohorts against products.
interface.longDescription: Betabots helps agents create defined-past synthetic users, run multi-session product journeys, simulate social interaction, capture raw first-person storylines, synthesize insights, and iterate products from realistic user behavior.
defaultPrompt: Run a betabot cohort against this app.
Simulate live users and analyze friction.
